name: Neil's Klondike Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 12 ounces can Bo Ortega green chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry onions, celery, and garlic until the onions are translucent.
2. Place the mixture in a large pot made of cast iron or stainless steel.
3. Brown the ground chuck in a skillet and drain off any liquid.
4. Add diced tomatoes and put them into the pot (draining cans is optional).
5. Stir in the kidney beans and tomato sauce, then bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer slowly for 1 hour, stirring often to prevent sticking.
7. Add green chili salsa, salt, chili powder, and hot sauce to taste.
8. Simmer for an additional 2 hours until very thick and spicy.
9. Serves 15 - 18 people.
